seoTitle: Tumbi Umbi vs Tumblong — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tumbi Umbi and Tumblong. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Tumbi Umbi vs Tumblong: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tumbi Umbi and Tumblong.
heading: Tumbi Umbi vs Tumblong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tumbi Umbi, New South Wales and Tumblong, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tumblong has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Tumbi Umbi (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tumbi Umbi or Tumblong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tumbi Umbi has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Tumblong scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tumbi Umbi scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Tumblong scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tumbi Umbi or Tumblong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tumblong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
